creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
There are some small issues in the pkg-plist:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/bin/dxirc-qt is linked to /usr/local/lib/liblua-5.3.so from lang/lua53 but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USES+=lua
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/icons/flags/ae.png
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/icons/flags/ag.png
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/icons/flags/al.png
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/icons/flags/an.png
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/icons/flags/ao.png
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1
